basic_details.job_title: CSIR NEIST Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 MTS, Driver Posts
basic_details.organization_name: CSIR - North East Institute of Science & Technology (CSIR NEIST)
basic_details.short_information: CSIR - North East Institute of Science & Technology (CSIR NEIST) Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS) / Driver (Non-Technical) (DR) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.neist.res.in . A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the CSIR NEIST Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS) / Driver Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Max 25 years for MTS, Max 27 years for Driver
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit for MTS: 25 years Maximum Age Limit for Driver: 27 years

qualification.details: Multi-Tasking Staff (Post Code : MTS): Matriculation or equivalent pass. Desirable Qualification: Intermediate (12th class) pass. Driver (Non-Technical) (Post Code : DR): Refer to CSIR-NEIST Website www.neist.res.in

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR NEIST to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
